flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Mississippi Delta Community College are 14% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($28.4k vs $33.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mississippi Delta Community College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mississippi Delta Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.1k → $3.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mississippi Delta Community College fell 34% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $3.5k).
